attacker_boundary.truth_key_role: revealed only after all held-out wrong passes

decision: retain simple proof-frequency/recency transfer only if its frozen held-out gate passes; on failure record the single boundary that identity-only counts omit target-conditioned proof relations and do not rescue-sweep
hypothesis: a fixed-size target-independent stream state trained only on BUILD proof participation transfers a better carry-identity schedule to disjoint held-out Full20/Full256 candidate filters

mechanism.exact_certificate: reason-DAG switch slice independently replayed from a fresh propagator
mechanism.matched_switch_work: all schedulers start from the identical depth-30 network and enable one exact c31 identity per step until first conflict
mechanism.reader: descending frequency, then descending recency, then ascending identity
mechanism.state: one uint16 saturating frequency and uint16 proof-batch recency per 336 named identities, plus one uint16 saturating batch clock
mechanism.stream_event: one exact proof-participating c31 identity from an independently replayed BUILD wrong-candidate conflict
mechanism.update: one pass over each proof batch; frequency increments and recency takes the batch clock, with no gradient, NN, or target-specific slot

summary.success_gate: frozen learned order strictly beats the best early/final/random aggregate by (first-conflict switches, constraint visits), or yields a strictly smaller exact certificate on the same held-out case
